recommendations.title: Loue-moi !
recommendations.overview: Lea opens an agency where anybody can rent her to play the part the clients need: a daughter, a girlfriend, a customer, you name it...

recommendations.title: The Taming of the Shrewd
recommendations.overview: When a heartbroken scientist moves back home to start over, her scheming brother hires a handsome stranger to convince her to sell their land.

recommendations.title: Waitress
recommendations.overview: A small town waitress stuck in a lousy marriage finds love when an exciting out-of-towner enters her life.

recommendations.title: Irma la Douce
recommendations.overview: When a recently fired policeman falls in love with a French prostitute, he doesn't want her to be with other men, so he creates an alter-ego in order to become her only customer.

recommendations.title: Of Human Bondage
recommendations.overview: A young man finds himself attracted to a cold and unfeeling waitress who may ultimately destroy them both.

recommendations.title: Cottage Country
recommendations.genres: Action, Comedy, Crime, Romance, Thriller, Horror

recommendations.title: A Princess for Christmas
recommendations.genres: Comedy, Family, TV Movie, Romance, Drama

recommendations.title: Dan in Real Life

recommendations.title: Life in a Year
recommendations.overview: A 17 year old finds out that his girlfriend is dying, so he sets out to give her an entire life, in the last year she has left.

recommendations.title: My Blind Brother
recommendations.overview: Love for the same woman causes conflict between an over-achieving blind athlete and the brother who made him that way.
